name: codex-paper
description: Turn research papers into structured study environments with generated notes, summaries, code demos, and a local web viewer.

interface.shortDescription: Study papers with generated materials and a local viewer
interface.longDescription: Generate structured study materials for research papers, keep a local paper library, and browse the results through the bundled Nuxt-based web viewer.
defaultPrompt: Study a research paper PDF and generate a reusable learning workspace
Summarize this paper and add it to my local research library
Launch the Codex Paper web viewer for my saved papers
